content:
📊 每日AI科研速递 — 2026年05月12日
今日热点: Agent工具 + 推理加速 + 本地部署

🔥 [LLM/Agent] 开源项目精选
1 [strukto-ai/mirage](https://github.com/strukto-ai/mirage)
A Unified Virtual Filesystem For AI Agents
标签: agent-sandbox,agent-tools | ⭐1934

2 [aattaran/deepclaude](https://github.com/aattaran/deepclaude)
Use Claude Code's autonomous agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro, OpenRouter, or any
标签: AI | ⭐1773

3 [yaojingang/yao-open-prompts](https://github.com/yaojingang/yao-open-prompts)
Yao Open Prompts：中文 AI 提示词库，覆盖工作、学习、内容、营销和生活场景
标签: ai,chinese-prompts | ⭐1625

4 [huangserva/3DCellForge](https://github.com/huangserva/3DCellForge)
AI-powered interactive 3D cell generation and exploration studio.
标签: AI | ⭐1367

5 [raiyanyahya/how-to-train-your-gpt](https://github.com/raiyanyahya/how-to-train-your-gpt)
Build a modern LLM from scratch. Every line commented. Explained like we are fiv
标签: attention-mechanism,deep-learning | ⭐1007

6 [lightseekorg/tokenspeed](https://github.com/lightseekorg/tokenspeed)
TokenSpeed is a speed-of-light LLM inference engine.
标签: blackwell,deepseek | ⭐945

7 [zarazhangrui/beautiful-html-templates](https://github.com/zarazhangrui/beautiful-html-templates)
A library of HTML slide templates designed so any coding agent can pick the righ
标签: AI | ⭐861

8 [WenyuChiou/awesome-agentic-ai-zh](https://github.com/WenyuChiou/awesome-agentic-ai-zh)
AI Agent 中文學習地圖 — 從零開始的結構化學習路徑，每階段有必做練習跟必修閱讀。三語對照（繁中／简中／English）。歡迎社群一起貢獻、優化內容。
标签: agentic-ai,ai-agents | ⭐849

9 [thakur-works/DarkGPT](https://github.com/thakur-works/DarkGPT)
Darkgpt mod free #chatgpt
标签: chatgpt-bypass,chatgpt5 | ⭐532

10 [Agent-3-7/hermes-agent-mission-control](https://github.com/Agent-3-7/hermes-agent-mission-control)
Mission Control Kanban for your Hermes Agent
标签: AI | ⭐528

🌐 [Tech/News] 科技热门
1 [NVIDIA Blackwell新芯片](https://www.nvidia.com)
标签: 硬件

2 [OpenAI GPT-5 Rumors](https://openai.com)
标签: LLM

3 [Anthropic CWC更新](https://www.anthropic.com)
标签: Agent

📰 [AI/Research] 技术博客
1 [Teaching AI to Reason](https://www.anthropic.com/research)
标签: AI安全

2 [Long Context Window](https://arxiv.org)
标签: 上下文

📈 趋势总结
• Agent工具持续爆发
• 推理效率成竞争焦点
• 本地部署需求增长
